extortion.description: [AI generated] IUSA.MX, also known as Industrias Unidas, S.A. De C.V, is a Mexico-based company primarily engaged in the manufacture of diverse products in the fields of construction, telecommunication, and infrastructure development. The company produces, sells, and distributes a wide variety of products such as cables, transformers, switchgear, and metering equipment for the electric industry. It also invests in real estate, technology, and health sectors.
